rationale: Error message wording improvement for validation errors; no specific spec rule contradicted.
Race condition in test code between test thread and background topology scanner; no spec violation.
CMake build error for missing check_symbol_exists include; build toolchain issue, not spec.
CMake preprocessor error when ENABLE_SRV=OFF; build configuration bug, not spec behavior.
ASAN-found memory safety bugs in URI and UTF-8 validation; robustness/security issue, not a named spec rule violation.
Assert failure when read concern level is NULL in internal freeze function; implementation bug, no spec rule cited.
Internal refactor of read/write concern BSON caching from freeze-on-first-read to invalidation; no spec behavior changed.
Write concern spec requires omitting default (empty) writeConcern; driver sends empty writeConcern in insert/update/delete commands.
DNS Seedlist spec says client SHOULD warn on duplicate TXT record options; driver does not emit the warning.
Spec requires topology be invalid if any SRV hostname mismatches service root; driver only warns and omits the hostname.
Documentation fix for command_with_opts and aggregate RST pages; no driver behavior change.
bypassDocumentValidation was incorrectly added to write-opts docs but is not processed by mongoc_cmd_parts_append_opts; doc/impl inconsistency.
Spec says 'Client must throw a parse exception' for malformed TXT options; driver only logs a warning.
Deprecating minPoolSize because it behaves unexpectedly; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec rule violation.
Driver omits client write concern for findAndModify on MongoDB 3.2; write concern spec requires it to be applied.
Documentation reorganization combining two RST files; no behavior change.
Sessions spec prohibits afterClusterTime on commands that don't support it; driver adds it to generic commands, causing server error.
New API to expose bson_validate_flags_t to callers of update/insert; feature addition, not spec nonconformance.
BSON_HAS_RAND_R macro never defined so conditional compilation logic is dead; internal build code issue.
Compiler warnings on mingw-w64; build toolchain issue, no spec behavior involved.
CRUD spec requires user-specified batchSize be used for getMore; aggregate only applies it to the first batch.
DNS Seedlist spec requires TXT record options (including authSource) to be applied; driver copies URI before TXT options are merged.
Internal refactor of SCRAM-SHA-1 base64 decoder initialization to remove SSL dependency; no behavior change.
Documentation improvement noting GridFS file mutation is not concurrency-safe; no code change.
Fix for CDRIVER-2418 dropped explicit readConcern option from MONGOC_CMD_RAW commands; spec requires readConcern to be honored.
Segfault when empty command document passed; null-dereference crash in internal string comparison, not a spec rule.
Performance regression in small reads/writes benchmarks; no spec behavior involved.
New API to accept string lengths for decimal128/regex; convenience API addition for C++ driver interop, not spec behavior.
Sessions spec says 'driver MUST NOT send a session ID with authenticate commands'; driver appends lsid to authenticate.
Off-by-one in internal byte-size calculation for bson_append_regex; arithmetic bug, not a BSON spec rule violation.
Read/write concern spec: 'driver MUST error if MaxWireVersion < 5 and a write concern has been explicitly specified'; driver doesn't throw.
BSON_STATIC_ASSERT macro takes 2 args but is called with 3; internal preprocessor macro definition bug.
Bulk insert over-validates documents (rejects empty keys); internal validation policy, not a spec-mandated behavior.
Altering BSON_STATIC_ASSERT_JOIN2 macro in public header breaks Fedora ABI; packaging/API-compatibility issue.
BSON_STATIC_ASSERT typedef collision in clang when used on same line number in multiple files; compiler portability bug.
Coverity double-unlock defect in topology background thread; static analysis finding, no spec rule.
Coverity resource leak in _mongoc_write_opquery; static analysis memory leak, no spec rule.
Sessions spec: 'driver MUST NOT send a session ID with unacknowledged writes'; driver sends lsid and txnNumber on unacknowledged writes.
CMake requires both static and shared libbson even when only one is needed; build system configuration issue.
Triage task for Coverity 'unchecked return value' warnings; static analysis triage, no spec behavior.
retryWrites=true silently drops transaction ID when crypto unavailable; spec requires driver to warn or error, not silently degrade.
Cursor clone omits write concern; internal cursor API inconsistency, cursor write concerns are not spec-defined behavior.
TLS handshake blocks topology scanner instead of using non-blocking I/O; performance/concurrency implementation issue, no specific SDAM rule violated.
mongoc_collection_find_indexes can return NULL on error; API contract bug, but find_indexes is not a UTF-spec-defined operation.
Use validate:0 in benchmark code to avoid overhead; performance benchmark improvement, not spec behavior.
Remove unused 'off' field from mongoc_buffer_t; internal dead-code refactor, no behavior change.
Add Evergreen valgrind tasks for mock server tests; CI infrastructure improvement, not spec behavior.
_mongoc_write_opquery() calls session-reply handler unreachable on wire version < 6; dead code cleanup.
Documentation improvement for mongoc_client_pool_push explaining pool size URI options; no code change.
Update MSYS2 installation instructions for 1.9.0 build; documentation/packaging, no spec behavior.
